title: Betaken Boss one
description: Bored of fighting regular bosses?, well good luck on this one!
body:
Tired of fighting the same old boss over and over?

And want to see a **MEME boss** or something like that?

**Well heres the mod just for ur boredom!**

> # Betaken Boss ONE
> **ORIGINAL VERSION**  
> this mod adds **1 boss** called: **BeTaken**
> this boss has some **WILD abilitys**,  
> and **please know that all abilitys and everything you read from them, is just a joke**  
> this mod was made specificly as a challange and goof around
> ### What can he do?
> - he can throw mars balls, explodes on impact
> - he can go super fast
> - can summon his minions for protection, you have to kill those before attempting to attack the boss  
>  **theres 2 more stuff he can do but i will let you see them :)**  
>  **other wise its just spoiling**

> # How to summon the boss?
> **you have to throw on the ground these listed items**
> - 6 white dyes
> - 1 orange concrete
